revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家族風呂]]
[[File:Nishimuraya Hotel Shogetsutei Kinosaki Onsen Japan41s3.jpg|thumb|260px|Paid family bath (at {{ill|Kinosaki Onsen|de|Kinosaki Onsen|ja|城崎温泉|zh|城崎温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinosaki Onsen|qq=}})]] '''Kazokuburo''' (家族風呂) refers to a {{ill|Public bathing|en|Public bathing|qid=Q785952|lt=Public Bathhouse|1=Public bathing}} or {{ill|Ryokan|en|Ryokan|qid=Q562930|lt=ryokan|1=Ryokan}} bath that can be exclusively reserved by {{ill|Family|en|Family|qid=Q8436|lt=families|1=Family}}<ref>[http://dictionary.goo.ne.jp/leaf/jn2/41576/m0u/ デジタル大辞泉「家族風呂」]</ref>. In response to user requests—such as the inconvenience of separate men's and women's baths during a {{ill|family|de|Familienreise|ja|家族旅行|zh|家庭旅行|lt=family trip|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/family|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 家族|1=Family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8436}}, or the inability to relax in a {{ill|large bath|de|Großbad|ja|大風呂|1=Daiyokujō|2=de|3=große Gemeinschaftsbäder|4=ja|5=大浴場|1=Daiyokujō|2=de|3=große Gemeinschaftsbäder|4=ja|5=大浴場|1=Daiyokujō|6=zh|7=大型公共浴池|1=Daiyokujō|6=zh|7=大型公共浴池|zh|大型浴池|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/large bath|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiyokujō|qq=}} due to noisy inebriated bathers—more {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|qid=Q655311|lt=onsen|1=Onsen}} resorts and ryokan are installing family baths. Additionally, some facilities provide family baths for {{ill|hot spring therapy|de|Heilbad|ja|湯治|zh|温泉疗养|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hot spring therapy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Thermal bath|qid=Q1004887}} to accommodate guests with {{ill|skin diseases|de|HautkRankheiten|ja|皮膚病|1=Dermatology|2=ja|3=皮膚病|4=de|5=Hautkrankheit|zh|皮肤病|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/skin diseases|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 皮膚科学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q171171}}, allowing them to bathe without concern for others' gaze.
== Form == Many facilities offer a smaller bath large enough for a few family members. These baths are larger than typical household bathrooms designed for one or two people and are sizes usually found only at such venues or small-scale guesthouses. The types of baths vary widely, from indoor baths to {{ill|open-air bath|de|Freiluftbad|ja|露天風呂|zh|露天浴池|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/open-air bath|1=Outdoor hot spring baths|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10856214}}. Usage time restrictions range from about one hour per session to unlimited.
To use a family bath, arrangements vary by facility: * Reservations required in advance * Reservations made at check-in * Available on a first-come, first-served basis at the front desk Be sure to confirm the specific policy beforehand.
Some resorts and ryokan may charge additional bathing fees or hot spring taxes.
== In literature == In the novel 'Slave' (1926) by {{ill|Hosoi Wakizō|de|Hosoi Wakizō|ja|細井和喜蔵|zh|细井和喜藏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosoi Wakizō|1=Wakizō Hosoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11605793}}, there is a scene in which the protagonist, a worker at a textile mill in Osaka, hesitates between choosing a family bath or a public bath at Ōshioyu in Ōhama ({{ill|Sakai|en|Sakai|qid=Q193428|lt=Sakai|1=Sakai}}), and ultimately buys separate men's and women's public bath tickets.
== Recent issues == There have been reports nationwide of some inappropriate sexual use of family baths by individuals disrupting public morals. In response, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}} revised its regulations on January 1, 2008, lifting the prohibition on mixed bathing in family baths and similar facilities only for "married couples", "parents with children under ten years old", and "families requiring assistance"<ref name="hyougokoube">[http://www.city.kobe.lg.jp/information/public/comment/gyoute/080hokenfukushi/0801_yokujyou.html 神戸市 公衆浴場営業許可等に関する取扱い要綱の一部改正について]</ref><ref>[https://web.pref.hyogo.lg.jp/pa13/documents/000089199.pdf 兵庫県公報 公衆浴場基準条例の一部を改正する条例]</ref>. Alongside the prefecture's revision, {{ill|Kobe|en|Kobe|qid=Q48320|lt=Kobe City|1=Kobe}} amended its guidelines to require presentation of documents showing address and name to verify marital status<ref name="hyougokoube" />.
== Notes == {{Reflist}}
